name: MarketplaceCheckoutGateway

ironRules.rule: BOLA check MUST be ORDER 1: cart.buyerTenantId === ALS.tenantId. Proceeding to cart lock before BOLA enables cross-tenant cart takeover.
SETNX cart lock MUST be ORDER 2 with TTL from FREEDOM config key 'checkout_lock_ttl_ms'. Hardcoded TTL or lock before BOLA = BUILD_FAILURE.
OCC inventory reservation MUST occur at ORDER 3-4 after lock acquired. Reservation before lock allows concurrent checkouts to oversell.
DNA-8: storeDocument(audit) MUST occur BEFORE enqueue(CheckoutReserved). Record must exist before downstream T610 processes the event.
tenantId MUST be resolved from AsyncLocalStorage only — NEVER from request payload. Accepting tenantId as a parameter enables tenant impersonation.

keywords: MarketplaceCheckoutGateway T609 BOLA ORDER 1 SETNX cart lock OCC inventory reservation storeDocument CheckoutReserved DNA-8 ALS tenantId FLOW-16
